header.objective: Define accuracy requirements for solutions-architect architectural analysis output
header.evaluator_input: spec_json + execution_log + query → boolean state per field

trigger_conditions.description: Lens and option integrity must be accurate

criteria.name: lens_accuracy
criteria.condition: Output explicitly names which lens was applied and states what it revealed; lens findings are not skipped or shortcut (SYSTEM_PROMPT lines 200, 219-229)
criteria.evaluator_query: Did the execution log show the applied lens was explicitly named and its findings stated?

criteria.name: option_distinctness_accuracy
criteria.condition: Each option has a distinct core architectural move not just different framing; no option duplicated with cosmetic differences; genuine equivalence explicitly reported not fabricated (SYSTEM_PROMPT lines 215, 363-365)
criteria.evaluator_query: Did the execution log show options were genuinely distinct and equivalence honestly reported?

criteria.name: drag_gain_accuracy
criteria.condition: Every structural change classified as compounding gain or structural drag with explicit mechanism stated; no 'could go either way' vague judgments (SYSTEM_PROMPT lines 67-72, 208-209)
criteria.evaluator_query: Did the execution log show every change had explicit drag/gain classification with mechanism?

required_actions.description: Operational and evidence accuracy must be verifiable

criteria.name: operational_accuracy
criteria.condition: Stated failure modes are real; observability gaps are real not fabricated; rollback paths are viable; operator burden accurately assessed; non-viable options correctly flagged (SYSTEM_PROMPT lines 212, 107-111)
criteria.evaluator_query: Did the execution log show operational assessments were accurate and real?

criteria.name: evidence_accuracy
criteria.condition: Claims supported by stated evidence not inference elevated to fact; contradictory evidence surfaced not suppressed; 'no information' distinguished from 'conflicting information' (SYSTEM_PROMPT lines 360-361)
criteria.evaluator_query: Did the execution log show evidence matched claims and contradictions were surfaced?

criteria.name: self_validation_performed
criteria.condition: Self-validation confirmed lens discipline, option distinctness, drag/gain explicitness, operational realism, and schema conformance before return (SYSTEM_PROMPT lines 108, 242-243)
criteria.evaluator_query: Did the execution log show self-validation checked all required dimensions?

prohibited_actions.description: Output must not contain inaccurate or inflated claims

criteria.name: no_vague_tradeoff_judgments
criteria.condition: Tradeoffs not stated as 'could go either way' without mechanism; strengths/weaknesses/risks/best-fit context actually apply to the option as described (SYSTEM_PROMPT line 209)
criteria.evaluator_query: Did the execution log show tradeoffs were specific and accurate, not vague?

criteria.name: no_comparison_table_inconsistency
criteria.condition: Comparison table values accurately reflect the options; table comparisons consistent with detailed option descriptions (SYSTEM_PROMPT line 383)
criteria.evaluator_query: Did the execution log show comparison tables were consistent with option descriptions?

evaluator_summary.pass_threshold: all checks must return true for spec compliance
